text  
the student needs the button's area to be at least 10 square inches for all screen widths between 3 inches and 6 inches. the inequality is 2x³ - 5x² + 3x - 7 ≥ 10. solving this inequality, the range of x-values that satisfy the condition is 3 ≤ x ≤ 6.  
******  
the student wants to find the exact screen width where the button's area is 15 square inches. solving the equation 2x³ - 5x² + 3x - 7 = 15, the solution is x = 3. the second solution is x = 4.
